Name: Reading & Maths Essential Skills for Year 2 Family Bundle + FREE Ultimate Rewards Book
Description:
[description]

1. 200 Essential Reading Skills for Year 2

Strong reading and comprehension skills are essential for academic success and lifelong learning.

The ABC Reading Eggspress program (Australian curriculum) provides a comprehensive and systematic way to improve and extend reading, grammar, spelling, and literacy skills in a fun and motivating way.

The Year 2 Essential Skills program provides a rigorous 36-week curriculum with easy-to-follow comprehension, spelling, and grammar lessons.

These lessons build 200 essential reading skills to understand new ideas, make connections, write effectively, and unlock deeper comprehension of a wide range of texts.

This extensive Year 2 workbook provides a rigorous curriculum with:

  • 200 essential reading skills
  • 72 comprehension lessons
  • Fiction and nonfiction texts
  • 72 spelling lessons
  • 36 grammar lessons
  • 4 reviews that test knowledge
  • Answer sheets
  • A yearly planner
  • Full-colour pages
  • 217 pages in total

This workbook is based on the online reading program ABC Reading Eggspress, which is part of the multi-award-winning ABC Reading Eggs suite.

2. 200 Essential Maths Skills for Year 2

The ABC Mathseeds program provides step-by-step lessons that children really enjoy!

The Year 2 Essential Maths Skills program (Australian curriculum) improves skills in numbers, addition, subtraction, fractions, geometry, measurement, and problem-solving in just 15 minutes a day!

Children who use ABC Mathseeds are excited by maths, have a deeper understanding of maths concepts, and score higher in independent testing.

With 50 easy-to-achieve lessons, this book covers the 200 essential skills your child needs to excel in Year 2 maths.

Every page in this book is carefully structured to improve your child's maths skills with interesting and engaging activities.

The workbook covers:

  • Counting to 1000
  • Numbers
  • Fractions
  • Operations
  • Word problems
  • Patterns
  • Addition
  • Subtraction
  • Geometry
  • Measurement
  • Time
  • 50 lessons with four worksheets each
  • 10 quizzes with lesson reviews and rewards
  • A yearly planner
  • Full-colour pages
  • 260 pages in total

Workbook complements ABC Mathseeds Lessons 101–150, Map 21–30.

3. ABC Reading Eggs Ultimate Rewards Book

Our new ABC Reading Eggs Ultimate Rewards Book helps to easily track, celebrate, and reward your child’s progress in the ABC Reading Eggs and ABC Mathseeds online programs.

The Rewards Book is the ultimate offline companion, bursting with over 200 stickers, engaging activities, a detachable height chart, and an overview of each map and the lessons your child is working on, so you can see exactly what they’re learning at a glance!

You and your child will delight in using the colourful stickers to mark each achievement.

The Rewards Book also includes overviews of the sounds, skills, words, and books covered in each lesson. Helpful program overviews guide you through additional features of the program such as Spelling Bank, Storylands, and the Library, to make sure you’re getting the most out of your subscription.

As your child completes each lesson, have them find the matching critter sticker to add to their map. This will keep them motivated to make real progress on their learning journey, as they celebrate each milestone with exciting sticker rewards!

Plus, the bonus keepsake height chart helps you track your child’s height over time alongside their progress throughout the programs. Fully detachable and perfect for hanging on your wall at home, it’s a keepsake you’ll treasure for years to come!

Here’s why you and your child will love the Ultimate Rewards Book:

    • It’s easy to follow along with: See exactly what your child is learning based on the map and lesson they’re completing, down to the exact books they’re reading – it's all right here!
    • It helps families celebrate learning milestones: Your child can use over 200 stickers to track their progress and celebrate each of their reading and maths milestones.
    • It comes with a detachable height chart: This unique addition helps children track their physical growth alongside their reading and maths progress.
    • It includes our ABC Mathseeds program too: Alongside ABC Reading Eggs, our new Rewards Book incorporates our ABC Mathseeds program, offering a more comprehensive learning experience that covers both essential literacy and numeracy skills.

  • ABC ReadingEggs Lessons 101–150, Map 21–30.

  • 200 Essential Maths Skills for Year 2 - 260 pages

[description]

ABC Reading Eggs Teaching Guide Book 1 (Lessons 1 – 30)

The ABC Reading Eggs online program combines a progressive sequence of highly-instructional learning activities with motivational elements – colourful animations, fun music, and exciting rewards – that keep kids motivated to learn. That is why 91% of homeschool parents using ABC Reading Eggs have seen a noticeable improvement in their child’s reading skills.

If you are teaching your child at home, you can use the ABC Reading Eggs Teaching Guide four-book-set (initially developed for teachers), to guide and support your child as they cover the first 120 ABC Reading Eggs lessons that are the core of the online learn-to-read program.

This book covers lessons 1 – 30. Each lesson is supported by 2 pages of teaching notes with learning objectives, Australian Curriculum links, classroom activities and an ABC Reading Eggs lesson sequence.

Note: This book is the Australian Curriculum Edition

Resource Type: Literacy Resource 

Subject: Literacy, English
School Level: Lower Primary

About the series:

The four books in the ABC Reading Eggs Teaching Guide series cover the 120 ABC Reading Eggs lessons that are the core of the learn-to-read program.

Each lesson has now been fully cross-referenced to all other components in the program and to the Australian Curriculum.

Every lesson comes with four student worksheets that focus on a specific skill including:

  • phonemic awareness
  • phonics
  • sight words
  • vocabulary
  • comprehension

[description]

ABC Reading Eggs - My First - Phonics 

Part of the Reading Eggs My First Series, the Phonics workbook is perfect for children who are building their reading foundations and takes them on a colourful adventure through 80 pages of visually rich, highly engaging learning exercises.  

These foundations include five building blocks that children need to master to become fluent readers. They are: 

  • Phonemic awareness 
  • Phonics instruction 
  • Vocabulary 
  • Fluency 
  • Reading comprehension.  

Phonics is a crucial building block and leading with a phonics first approach when teaching children to read is widely acclaimed by researchers, literacy experts and educators. Phonics helps children to read as it teaches them to connect the relevant sounds made by each letter, or combinations of letters and the different ways these sounds can be formed. Essentially, it will help your child connect what’s on the page with the language they speak.   

My First Phonics has a focus on activities that encourage the understanding of letter sounds, where children can complete simple, structured and fun lessons that engage them while they learn. They will be on the road to reading their first words in no time!  

More than 20 million children have cracked the reading code using the ABC Reading Eggs program and books. The My First series of books is a great beginning to your child’s reading journey. Get yours today.

Name: Learn-to-Read Flashcards Bundle – Alphabet, Phonics, Words (Ages 3–7)
Description:
[description]

The Flashcards Bundle contains:

Alphabet and Phonics Flashcards – Reading Eggs

Flashcards have always been a popular learning tool for beginner readers. The Reading Eggs Alphabet Flashcards make learning the 26 letters of the alphabet a fun experience.

Featuring bright colours, gorgeous illustration and 7 skill-building games, your child will stay entertained for hours learning the shape and sound of each letter.

Children can match letters to words with the self-checking cards – just flip them over to make a matching Reading Eggs critter!

The pack also includes easy-to-follow instructions to make sure your child gets the most out of the experience.

The 7 games will help children learn to:

  • recognise letter shapes
  • hear letter sounds
  • match pictures to words to sounds
  • understand alphabetical order
  • read and spell simple words.

 

Sight Word & Word-Building Flashcards – Reading Eggs

These aren’t your average flashcards! The Reading Eggs Beginning to Read Flashcards are designed by experienced educators to help children practise reading, phonics and spelling skills.

And they’re so much fun!

Featuring bright colours, gorgeous illustration and a variety of skill-building games, your child will stay entertained for hours practising sight words and simple sentences at home. The pack also includes easy-to-follow instructions to make sure your child gets the most out of the experience.

This set contains three types of cards:

  • Letter and sound cards
  • Word ending cards
  • High frequency sight word cards

These cards are great on their own but also work fantastically well with the Reading Eggs program.

Name: Reading Eggs Ultimate Rewards Book
Description:
[description]

Our new Ultimate Rewards Book helps parents to easily track, celebrate and reward their child’s progress in the Reading Eggs and Mathseeds online programs - covering Reading Eggs Lessons 1–120 and Mathseeds Lessons 1–105.

The ultimate offline companion to our online program, the Ultimate Rewards Book is bursting with over 200 stickers, interactive activities, a keepsake height chart and an overview of each map and the lessons your child is working on, so you can see exactly what they’re learning at a glance!  You and your child will delight in using the stickers to mark their achievements, while reading overviews of the sounds, skills, words and books covered in each lesson.  

As your child completes each lesson, have them find the matching critter sticker to add to their map. This will keep your child motivated to make real progress on their reading journey, as they celebrate each milestone with exciting rewards along the way. 

Plus, the new Ultimate Rewards Book includes a FREE keepsake height chart for you to track your child’s height over time along with their progress throughout the program. Fully detachable and perfect for hanging on your wall at home, it’s a keepsake you’ll treasure for years to come! 

Here’s why children and parents are loving our new Ultimate Rewards Book: 

  • It’s easy to follow along with: See exactly what your child is learning based on the map and lesson they’re completing, down to the exact books they’re reading – it's all right here! 
  • It helps families celebrate learning milestones: Your child can use over 200 stickers to track their progress and celebrate each of their reading and maths milestones. 
  • It comes with a FREE keepsake height chart: This unique addition helps children track their physical milestones as well, making for a memorable keepsake.  
  • It includes our Mathseeds program too: Alongside Reading Eggs, our new Ultimate Rewards Book incorporates our Mathseeds program covering Lessons 1 - 105, offering a more comprehensive learning experience that covers both essential literacy and numeracy skills.

Ultimate Rewards Book

Our new Ultimate Rewards Book helps to easily track, celebrate, and reward your child’s progress in the Reading Eggs and Mathseeds online programs.

Plus, the bonus keepsake height chart helps you track your child’s height over time alongside their progress throughout the programs. Fully detachable and perfect for hanging on your wall at home, it’s a keepsake you’ll treasure for years to come!

Here’s why you and your child will love the Ultimate Rewards Book:

  • It’s easy to follow along with: See exactly what your child is learning based on the map and lesson they’re completing, down to the exact books they’re reading – it's all right here!

  • It includes our Mathseeds program too: Alongside Reading Eggs, our new Rewards Book incorporates our Mathseeds program, offering a more comprehensive learning experience that covers both essential literacy and numeracy skills.

This comprehensive bundle is designed to help your child build essential reading and maths skills while having fun and staying motivated!

As your child completes each lesson, have them find the matching critter sticker to add to their map. This will keep your child motivated to make real progress on their reading journey, as they celebrate each milestone with exciting rewards along the way. 

Plus, the new ABC Ultimate Rewards Book includes a FREE keepsake height chart for you to track your child’s height over time along with their progress throughout the program. Fully detachable and perfect for hanging on your wall at home, it’s a keepsake you’ll treasure for years to come! 

Here’s why children and parents are loving our new Ultimate Rewards Book: 

  • It’s easy to follow along with: See exactly what your child is learning based on the map and lesson they’re completing, down to the exact books they’re reading – it's all right here! 
  • It helps families celebrate learning milestones: Your child can use over 200 stickers to track their progress and celebrate each of their reading and maths milestones. 
  • It comes with a FREE keepsake height chart: This unique addition helps children track their physical milestones as well, making for a memorable keepsake.  
  • It includes our Mathseeds program too: Alongside ABC Reading Eggs, our new Rewards Book incorporates our ABC Mathseeds program, offering a more comprehensive learning experience that covers both essential literacy and numeracy skills.

Name: Beginning to Read Mini Books  Pack 5 (Ages 5–7)
Description:
[description]

Reading Eggs - Beginning to Read - Book Pack 5 contains 10 readers, a poster and sticker sheet, parent guide and a FREE 14-day subscription to www.readingeggs.com, the website where children learn to read!

Once you have registered your child online, they will need to complete each lesson before they move on to the next one. Once a lesson has been completed, children will read a book online. The matching book can then be read from the Book Pack.

After each lesson, children will earn a new Reading Eggs critter and can keep track of their progress by adding stickers to their map poster (included in each pack). They can add their new Reading Eggs critter sticker, the book read and a star. It's fun!

[description]

Reading Eggs - Beginning to Read - Flashcards are an excellent way to practise reading and phonics skills. They also help to build spelling skills. With these cards you can play a variety of games which practise fundamental early reading skills. It makes reading sight words and simple sentences a fun and motivating experience.

These cards are great on their own but also work fantastically well with the Reading Eggs website www.readingeggs.com

Name: Grade 3 Math Workbook - 200 Essential Math Skills
Description:
[description]

The Mathseeds program provides step-by-step lessons that children really enjoy! The Third Grade Essential Math Skills program improves skills in numbers, operations, fractions,geometry, measurement,statistics and problem solving in just 15 minutes a day!

Children who use Mathseeds are excited by math, have a deeper understanding of math concepts, and score higher in independent testing.

With 50 easy-to-achieve lessons, this book covers the 200 essential skills your child needs to excel in Third Grade math.

Every page in this book is carefully structured to improve your child's math skills with interesting and engaging activities.

The workbook covers:

  • counting to 10000
  • geometry
  • algebra
  • operations
  • measurements
  • fractions
  • multiplication
  • addition
  • subtraction
  • statistics
  • 50 lessons with four worksheets each
  • 10 quizzes with lesson reviews and rewards
  • full-color pages
  • 240 pages in total.

Workbook complements Mathseeds Lesson 151 - 200, Map 31 - 40.

NOTE: This workbook is based on the US Grade 3 curriculum.

*Tablet and Subscription to be purchased seperately
[Supports-and-Reinforces]
  • Mathseeds Lessons 151 to 200
[Recommended-Age]
  • 7-9 years (Grade 3)
[Pages]
  • 240

Name: Reading Eggs Activity Book Education Bundle – 8 Books (Ages 4–7)
Description:
[description]

This special bundle offer is the ultimate offline companion to the award-winning Reading Eggs program. The fun and engaging activities fully support the online lessons, and serve as a powerful way to boost your child’s reading and writing skills at home.

Research shows that children enjoy the greatest gains in learning by using a combination of digital and print resources. This is the perfect choice to help your child master the essential early literacy skills they need for reading success.

Even if your child isn’t on Reading Eggs, these beautifully designed activity books are an excellent option for any child. Suitable for ages 4–7, they build essential skills in phonics, spelling, sight words, writing, and much more!

 These books will help children to:

  • recognise alphabet letters
  • write letters correctly
  • hear letter sounds
  • develop phonics skills
  • match pictures to sounds
  • practise their handwriting
  • read and write simple words and sentences
[Supports-and-Reinforces]

  • This fabulous book bundle matches the first 80 lessons of Reading Eggs, and contains:

    • ABC Reading Eggs Starting Out Activity Book 1 (lessons 1–10)
    • ABC Reading Eggs Starting Out Activity Book 2 (lessons 11–20)
    • ABC Reading Eggs Starting Out Activity Book 3 (lessons 21–30)
    • ABC Reading Eggs Starting Out Activity Book 4 (lessons 31–40)
    • ABC Reading Eggs Beginning to Read Activity Book 5 (lessons 41–50)
    • ABC Reading Eggs Beginning to Read Activity Book 6 (lessons 51–60)
    • ABC Reading Eggs Beginning to Read Activity Book 7 (lessons 61–70)
    • ABC Reading Eggs Beginning to Read Activity Book 8 (lessons 71–80)
[Recommended-Age]
  • Ages 4 to 7

Name: Reading Eggs Book Pack Level 2 (Ages 5–7)
Description:
[description]

Our popular Level 2 Book Pack is the perfect activity book bundle for children who are beginning to read.

Bursting with fun, colourful and enjoyable activity books, flashcards, reading books and more, the Level 2 Book Pack matches lessons 41–80 of the ABC Reading Eggs program, allowing your child to practise their skills offline.

Research shows that children enjoy the greatest gains in learning by using a combination of digital and print resources. The ABC Reading Eggs Level 2 Book Pack is guaranteed to bring a smile to your child’s face!

Suitable for children ages 5–7, the book pack can also be enjoyed as a standalone resource to support your child’s reading and writing skills at home.

Here’s what’s included:

  • 4 jam-packed activity books that match lessons 41–80 of the ABC Reading Eggs program

  • 200 colourful stickers and 4 mini posters that help your child track their reading progress and stay motivated to improve

  • 40 reading books which reinforce your child’s reading and phonics skills and are an excellent way to introduce them to physical books

  • ‘Beginning to Read’ flashcards featuring 36 word-building cards, 40 high-frequency word cards and 5 fun phonics games.
[Supports-and-Reinforces]
  • ABC Reading Eggs Lessons 41–80
[Recommended-Age]
  • Ages 5 to 7
